Org.OpenStreetMap.Diffs.MapChange.name: MapChange
Org.OpenStreetMap.Diffs.MapChange.description: An individual element change from the OpenStreetMap minutely replication diff feed. Each event represents a single create, modify, or delete operation on a node, way, or relation in the OSM database. The diff files are OsmChange XML documents published every 60 seconds at https://planet.openstreetmap.org/replication/minute/.

Org.OpenStreetMap.Diffs.ReplicationState.name: ReplicationState
Org.OpenStreetMap.Diffs.ReplicationState.description: Current replication state from the OpenStreetMap minutely diff feed. Emitted once per poll cycle to record which replication sequence was just processed. The state is read from https://planet.openstreetmap.org/replication/minute/state.txt.

schema.name: MapChange
schema.description: An individual element change from the OpenStreetMap minutely replication diff feed. Each event describes a create, modify, or delete of a node, way, or relation. Latitude and longitude are present only for node elements. Tags are JSON-encoded because xreg does not support map types natively.

change_type.description: The type of change applied to the element in this replication diff: create, modify, or delete, corresponding to the OsmChange XML sections.

element_type.description: The OSM element type: node, way, or relation. Nodes carry geographic coordinates; ways and relations reference other elements.

element_id.description: The unique numeric identifier of the OSM element within its element type namespace. Combined with element_type, this forms the globally unique OSM element identity.

version.description: The version number of this element. Each edit to an element increments the version by one.

timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp when this element version was created or last modified in the OSM database, as recorded in the OsmChange XML.

changeset_id.description: The numeric identifier of the OSM changeset that contains this element change. A changeset groups related edits by a single user.

user_name.description: The display name of the OSM user who made this edit. May be null for redacted or anonymous edits.

user_id.description: The numeric user identifier of the OSM contributor. May be null for redacted or anonymous edits.

latitude.description: The WGS-84 latitude of the node in decimal degrees. Present only when element_type is node; null for ways and relations.

longitude.description: The WGS-84 longitude of the node in decimal degrees. Present only when element_type is node; null for ways and relations.

tags.description: JSON-encoded object of key-value tag pairs attached to this element. Tags describe the element's real-world features such as name, highway type, or building classification. Encoded as a JSON string because xreg does not natively support map types.

sequence_number.description: The replication sequence number of the minutely diff file that contained this change. Useful for correlating changes back to specific replication state.

schema.name: ReplicationState
schema.description: The current replication state of the OpenStreetMap minutely diff feed. Published once per poll cycle. The sequence_number and timestamp are parsed from the Java-properties-style state.txt file at https://planet.openstreetmap.org/replication/minute/state.txt.

sequence_number.description: The monotonically increasing sequence number of the latest processed minutely diff file. Each diff file corresponds to exactly one sequence number.

timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp associated with the replication state, indicating the point in time up to which the diff file covers OSM edits.
